description_long: This is a gingerbread house cake, constructed with brown gingerbread walls and a steeply pitched roof covered in colorful, rectangular candy tiles arranged in rainbow stripes. The roof edges and house corners are decorated with piped white royal icing and round gumdrop candies in red, green, and white. The front features a circular red candy above a door outlined in white icing, flanked by green and red gumdrops and small green candies as accents. The sides of the house display small, rectangular windows bordered with white icing and rainbow candy panes, while the base is surrounded by a border of gumdrops and piped icing. The cake sits on a white, lacy-patterned paper doily, enhancing its festive and decorative appearance. The overall look is playful and vibrant, evoking a holiday or winter theme.
description: A colorful gingerbread house cake with rainbow candy roof tiles, gumdrop decorations, and piped white icing details, displayed on a white doily. The design is festive and playful, with intricate candy and icing accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rainbow-striped candy roof, green gumdrop roof edge, and two rectangular windows with rainbow candy panes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular red candy above the door, white icing door and window outlines, and gumdrop decorations framing the entrance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the rainbow candy roof, green gumdrop roof edge, and two windows with rainbow candy panes.
description_view_3: Back view showing a single window outlined in white icing with rainbow candy panes, and gumdrop decorations along the roof and base.
